LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STEPHEN RAFFLE, M.D.'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 425.16 NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE MOTION TO STRIKE IS GRANTED. THE CLAIMS ALLEGED CENTER ON PROTECTED, I.E. DR. RAFFLE SERVING AS AN EXPERT WITNESS IN A LITIGATED CASE. BRIGG VS. EDEN COUNSEL FOR HOPE AND OPPORTUNITY (1999) 19 CAL. 4TH 1106, 1116; TAHERI LAW GROUP VS. EVANS (2008) 72 CAL. RPTR. 847, FOX SEARCHLIGHT PICTURES, INC. VS PALADINO 2001) 89 CAL. APP. 4TH 294. PLAINTIFF HAS OFFERED NO EVIDENCE ESTABLISHING A BASIS FOR PLAINTIFF TO PREVAIL. THIS IS PARTICULARLY TRUE GIVEN THE BREADTH OF THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE. THE PRIVILEGE APPLIES TO ALL COMMUNICATIONS MADE IN LITIGATION "WHETHER FRAUDULENT PERJURIOUS, UNETHICAL OR EVEN ILLEGAL," KASHIAN VS. HARRIMAN (2002) 98 CAL. APP. 4TH 892, 920. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

(302/PJM/AY) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Notice Of Special Motion And Motion To Strike Prusuant To Ccp Section 425.16
Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT STEPHEN RAFFLE, M.D.'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 425.16

No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: the motion to strike is granted. The claims alleged center on protected, i.e. Dr. Raffle serving as an expert witness in a litigated case. Brigg vs. Eden Counsel for Hope and Opportunity (1999) 19 Cal. 4th 1106, 1116; Taheri Law Group vs. Evans (2008) 72 Cal. Rptr. 847, Fox Searchlight Pictures, Inc. vs Paladino 2001) 89 Cal. App. 4th 294. Plaintiff has offered no evidence establishing a basis for plaintiff to prevail. This is particularly true given the breadth of the litigation privilege. The privilege applies to all communications made in litigation "whether fraudulent perjurious, unethical or even illegal," Kashian vs. Harriman (2002) 98 Cal. App. 4th 892, 920. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/AY) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT STEPHEN RAFFLE, MD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained without leave to amend based on the court's ruling on the CCP 425.16 motion. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/AY) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
